feat.name: Walk the Wilds
feat.text: You know the ways of birds and beasts and have gained the right to wear their forms. You add *animal form* to your apparition spell repertoire, allowing you to cast it with your apparition spellcasting.

traits.name: Animist
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the animist class.

feat.special: If you cast the *darkened forest form* focus spell to turn into a form granted by animal form, you can Sustain it up to 5 minutes instead of its normal duration.
